<div align="center">

# ✨ InfiniEdit

### The Ultimate Save Editor for **Infinite Craft**

Fast • Powerful • Open Source

</p>

### **Edit, analyze, and visualize Infinite Craft save files directly in your browser.**

**No installation • No accounts • No uploads • Everything stays on your device**

### 🌐 Live Websites

**Primary:** https://infiniedit.qzz.io

**Mirror:** https://infiniedit.vercel.app

# ✨ Features

<table>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

## 📂 Save Management

- Open `.ic` save files
- Export back to `.ic`
- Export as JSON
- Drag & Drop support
- Autosave
- Backup manager
- Merge saves
- Compare saves

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

## 🧪 Element Editor

- Browse every element
- Instant search
- Advanced filters
- Multi-column sorting
- Add new elements
- Rename elements
- Edit emojis
- Delete elements
- Multi-select editing
- Live InfiniBrowser search & autocomplete when adding elements

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td valign="top">

## 📖 Recipe Editor

- Create recipes
- Edit recipes
- Delete recipes
- Import recipe lists
- Search recipes
- Missing ingredient detection
- Auto-fetch recipes live from the InfiniBrowser API
- Bulk-fill every missing recipe in one click

</td>
<td valign="top">

## 📊 Save Analysis

- Duplicate detection
- Dead-end detection
- Reachability analysis
- Missing dependencies
- Ingredient statistics
- Discovery tracking

</td>
</tr>

<tr>
<td valign="top">

## 🌐 Interactive Graph

- Dependency visualization
- Zoom & Pan
- Re-layout graph
- Highlight relationships
- Toggle labels
- Toggle emojis
- Center selected nodes

</td>
<td valign="top">

## ⚡ Quality of Life

- Undo / Redo
- Dark & Light themes
- Responsive layout
- Mobile friendly
- Keyboard shortcuts
- Toast notifications
- Automatic local backups

</td>
</tr>
</table>

---

# 🚀 Getting Started

Clone the repository:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/QikSeekDev/InfiniEdit.git
```

Or simply download the project and open:

```text
index.html
```

Then:

1. Open an Infinite Craft `.ic` save.
2. Edit your elements and recipes.
3. Export your updated save.

> **No installation required. No build tools. No server.**

---

# 💡 Why InfiniEdit?

> 🚀 Built for players who want complete control over their Infinite Craft saves.

### ✅ Modern Interface

A clean UI designed for speed and ease of use.

### ⚡ Fast

Everything runs directly in your browser with no server required.

### 🔒 Private

Your save files never leave your computer.

### 📱 Responsive

Works on desktops, tablets, and phones.

### 🌙 Beautiful

Dark mode and light mode included.

### 🧩 Lightweight

Built entirely with vanilla JavaScript.

No frameworks.

No dependencies.

---

# 🔒 Privacy

Your save files are processed **entirely in your browser**.

InfiniEdit never uploads your data.

Autosaves and backups are stored locally using your browser's Local Storage.

---

# 🛠 Built With

- HTML5
- CSS3
- Vanilla JavaScript

No frameworks.

No libraries.

No build tools.

---

# 🤝 Contributing

Bug reports, feature requests, and pull requests are always welcome.

If you have an idea that would improve InfiniEdit, feel free to open an issue or submit a PR.

---

# ⚠️ Disclaimer

InfiniEdit is an unofficial fan-made project.

It is **not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with Infinite Craft or its creators.**

---

If you find this project useful, consider giving it a ⭐ on GitHub!

### 🌐 Visit InfiniEdit

**https://infiniedit.qzz.io**

or

**https://infiniedit.vercel.app**

---

Made with ❤️ for the Infinite Craft community.
